meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Stop building tutorials and start shipping SaaS. Master the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to accelerate your MVP path to revenue today.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a revenue-killer that traps founders in infinite loops of passive learning. The Antigravity project template provides a production-ready, modular architecture that allows you to bypass boilerplate and focus on core value. By leveraging Claude Code, you transform your development workflow from manual coding to intelligent orchestration.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks watching YouTube tutorials, yet your SaaS dashboard remains empty. You are caught in the 'Tutorial Hell' trap—a cycle of consumption that feels like progress but delivers zero market validation. Every hour spent configuring auth boilerplate is an hour you aren't talking to paying customers.

The Antigravity project template is the antidote. It is a battle-tested, high-velocity architectural scaffold designed specifically for founders who need to ship to production yesterday. By integrating this with Claude Code, you move from a student to an architect, using AI to execute the heavy lifting while you focus on the product-market fit that actually scales.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture. This step ensures your project has the necessary directory structure for scalable growth.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity core stack with authentication, database ORM, and Stripe integration pre-configured.

steps.title: Define Domain Entities
steps.description: Map your business logic into code. We define the database schema that reflects your unique value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create domain models for User, Project, and Subscription based on a standard SaaS billing model using Prisma.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for saas entities'

steps.title: Implement API Gateway Routes
steps.description: Expose your logic to the frontend via secure, type-safe API endpoints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure API routes for the defined entities, ensuring all endpoints require authentication and validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold secure api endpoints for all models'

steps.title: Configure Monetization Hooks
steps.description: Connect your application logic to Stripe to ensure revenue collection is baked into the MVP.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate Stripe webhooks and subscription management flows into the existing user profile logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add stripe subscription logic to backend'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Ship your MVP. We finalize the build pipeline and push to your hosting provider.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for production, environment variables, and automated health checks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure ci/cd pipeline and verify production build'

pro_tips: Never manually write boilerplate; if you find yourself copying code, create a custom Antigravity snippet instead.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests simultaneously with your features to ensure 80% coverage from day one.
Prioritize Stripe integration before the UI; if you can't charge, you don't have a business.
Treat your codebase as a living document by using Claude to refactor technical debt every Friday afternoon.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' for your MVP; ignore edge cases until you have your first ten paying users.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, immediately implement a feedback loop by adding a simple analytics tracker and reaching out to 50 potential leads on LinkedIn.
content.conversion_block: You have the architecture, the tools, and the roadmap to stop learning and start earning. Don't let another week vanish into documentation. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
